name: BlueConch Technologies (Part of UST Global Inc.)
h1: BlueConch Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: BlueConch Technologies runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Ahmedabad, covering GBS and CoE, built over six years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BlueConch Technologies office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BlueConch Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BlueConch Technologies runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Ahmedabad), covering GBS and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: India Head Campus Recruitment & Early Careers

about.description: BlueConch Technologies's India footprint covers Pune and Ahmedabad, spanning GBS and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Finance & Accounting for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seventeen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does BlueConch Technologies operate in India?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BlueConch Technologies have centers in?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies's India footprint includes Pune and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does BlueConch Technologies run in India?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies runs GBS and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BlueConch Technologies's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for BlueConch Technologies's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BlueConch Technologies's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at BlueConch Technologies's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
